pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17, failing to leverage Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Flyway PostgreSQL database driver dependency required for Flyway 10+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 10+ removed database drivers from the core artifact; without this dependency, Flyway fails at runtime with a missing driver error when connecting to PostgreSQL.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the compiler may not strictly enforce Java 21 API usage or bytecode compatibility, leading to potential runtime issues on Java 21.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/controller.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.add(int, E) with List.addFirst(E) for adding elements at the beginning of a list.
src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/controller.why_exists: List.add(int, E) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0 on certain list implementations or as part of the broader deprecation of positional add/remove in favor of Deque/List interface methods like addFirst/addLast.
